ideas.title: word daisy
ideas.description: center word + 5 petals of associated words. tap a petal to make it the center. ~30 hardcoded groupings.

ideas.title: anagram
ideas.description: show a 5-letter scrambled word; tap letters to unscramble. on success, next word.

ideas.title: rhyme finder
ideas.description: tap one of ~20 seed words; show 3 rhymes (curated). cycle.

ideas.title: syllable splitter
ideas.description: type a short word; the page splits it into syllables visually. uses a small hardcoded dictionary.

ideas.title: fortune line
ideas.description: tap to draw one of ~40 short, calm fortune-cookie style lines. nothing alarming or salesy.

ideas.title: etymology card
ideas.description: show a single english word + a short, charming etymology line (from ~25 hand-picked). tap for next.

ideas.title: morse light
ideas.description: type a short string; render it in soft morse-code dot/dash light pulses across the screen.
